hero.title: THE JOURNAL
hero.subtitle: Stories from the world of LITHOS GRAND. Architecture, culture, and the art of silence.

intro.title: Stories That Define Us
intro.description: From the origins of our limestone monoliths to the voices that shape our philosophy. The Journal captures the essence of LITHOS through words, images, and ideas.
intro.quote: Every building has a story. Every silence speaks volumes.

featured.title: A Century of Limestone
featured.excerpt: From Auguste Perret's original vision to Zaha Hadid's final masterpiece. How one material defined a century of luxury.
featured.author: Eleanor Vance

stories.title: The Silence of Stone
stories.excerpt: Why acoustic isolation is the ultimate luxury in modern hospitality.
stories.author: James Chen

stories.title: A Conversation with Tadao Ando
stories.excerpt: The legendary architect reflects on light, concrete, and his only hotel project.
stories.author: Sophia Laurent

stories.title: The Art of the Boardroom
stories.excerpt: How meeting spaces shape the decisions that shape the world.
stories.author: Marcus Webb

stories.title: Fire, Stone, and Flavor
stories.excerpt: Behind the scenes at THE FORGE, where ancient techniques meet modern palates.
stories.author: Elena Marchetti

stories.title: The Vault: A Wine Odyssey
stories.excerpt: Exploring the 12,000-bottle collection hidden beneath our limestone floors.
stories.author: Jean-Luc Moreau

stories.title: Wellness in the Sky
stories.excerpt: How the 47th floor became a sanctuary for mind and body.
stories.author: Dr. Aisha Khan
